channel.title: NeutralAI Blog
channel.description: Practical guidance for PII-safe LLM adoption, privacy engineering, and AI governance.

item.title: NeutralAI vs Private AI vs Nightfall: PII Detection Benchmark 2026
item.description: A sales-safe comparison of public PII detection evidence, benchmark claims, and the questions buyers should ask before trusting vendor accuracy numbers.

item.title: How UK Financial Services Teams Use AI Safely Under FCA Guidance
item.description: A practical AI governance pattern for UK financial services teams adopting LLMs while protecting customer data and sensitive records.

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Shadow AI: Why Security Teams Need a Control Point
item.description: Shadow AI is not only a policy problem. It creates review cost, incident uncertainty, and adoption drag unless teams add a visible control point.

item.title: PII Detection Accuracy: Regex vs NER vs LLM-Based Approaches
item.description: A technical comparison of regex, named entity recognition, and LLM-based PII detection for teams protecting prompts before model routing.

item.title: From Presidio to Production: What Regulated Teams Actually Need
item.description: Presidio is a useful PII detection foundation, but regulated AI workflows need policy, routing, tokenization, and audit evidence around detection.

item.title: Why PII Masking Matters for Enterprise AI Adoption
item.description: A practical guide to why regulated teams need PII masking before prompts reach external AI providers.
